records.question: Which customers named Jensen M from Carleefort, USA have the login name pbecker, phone number (650)406-8761, and login password 5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.login_password = '5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4' AND customers.phone_number = '(650)406-8761' AND customers.country = 'USA' AND customers.customer_first_name = 'Jensen' AND customers.customer_middle_initial = 'M' AND customers.town_city = 'Carleefort' AND customers.login_name = 'pbecker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customer_id
FROM Customers
WHERE customer_first_name = 'Jensen'
  AND customer_middle_initial = 'M'
  AND town_city = 'Carleefort'
  AND country = 'USA'
  AND login_name = 'pbecker'
  AND phone_number = '(650)406-8761'
  AND login_password = '5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4'

records.question: Which customers have the login name exactly 'feeney.lauriane', have related orders and accounts records with other_account_details exactly 'VIP', and whose state_county_province is exactly 'Arkansas', customer_middle_initial is exactly 'K', town_city is exactly 'New Nikolas', phone_number is exactly '(488)524-5345', and email_address is exactly 'homenick.ambrose@example.net'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.login_name = 'feeney.lauriane' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' AND customers.state_county_province = 'Arkansas' AND customers.customer_middle_initial = 'K' AND customers.town_city = 'New Nikolas' AND customers.phone_number = '(488)524-5345' AND customers.email_address = 'homenick.ambrose@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
INNER JOIN Accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.login_name = 'feeney.lauriane'
AND a.other_account_details = 'VIP'
AND c.state_county_province = 'Arkansas'
AND c.customer_middle_initial = 'K'
AND c.town_city = 'New Nikolas'
AND c.phone_number = '(488)524-5345'
AND c.email_address = 'homenick.ambrose@example.net'

records.question: Which customers that are female have the first name Devin, the last name Glover, and are located in Florida?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.gender = '0' AND customers.state_county_province = 'Florida' AND customers.customer_first_name = 'Devin' AND customers.customer_last_name = 'Glover'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customer_id
FROM Customers
WHERE gender = 'F' AND customer_first_name = 'Devin' AND customer_last_name = 'Glover' AND state_county_province = 'Florida'

records.question: Which customers named Abbey with middle initial B, phone number 1-344-593-4896x425, login password d7629de5171fe29106c8, and located in California have a Regular account named 710 opened on or before 2009-06-13 11:41:52?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_middle_initial = 'B' AND customers.phone_number = '1-344-593-4896x425' AND accounts.account_name = '710' AND customers.customer_first_name = 'Abbey' AND accounts.date_account_opened <= '2009-06-13 11:41:52' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'Regular' AND customers.state_county_province = 'California' AND customers.login_password = 'd7629de5171fe29106c8'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_first_name = 'Abbey'
AND c.customer_middle_initial = 'B'
AND c.phone_number = '1-344-593-4896x425'
AND c.login_password = 'd7629de5171fe29106c8'
AND c.state_county_province = 'California'
AND a.account_name = '710'
AND a.date_account_opened <= '2009-06-13 11:41:52'

records.question: Which customers with the last name Auer and a login password of d4ade599672bccdabeee have a Regular account that was opened exactly on 2010-06-16 09:35:00?

records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_last_name = 'Auer'
AND c.login_password = 'd4ade599672bccdabeee'
AND a.account_name = 'Regular'
AND a.date_account_opened = '2010-06-16 09:35:00'

records.question: Which customers have accounts and are located in East Stephaniafort?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.town_city = 'East Stephaniafort'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN Accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.town_city = 'East Stephaniafort'

records.question: Which customers that are exactly female have both placed orders and hold accounts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.gender = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
INNER JOIN Accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
